title: glaucium oxylobum
intro: Glaucium oxylobum, also known as the Lesser Poppy or Sea Fennel, is a perennial plant species in the poppy family Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Glaucium oxylobum include its potential to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an anticonvulsant and antispasmodic agent. Glaucium oxylobum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although its usage should be cautioned and supervised due to its potential toxicity.
